symbols.name: RateLimiter
symbols.behavior: Limits the number of requests within a time window.
symbols.limitations: Does not handle edge cases correctly.

symbols.name: acquire
symbols.purpose: Acquires a slot in the rate limiter.
symbols.behavior: Returns a promise that resolves when a slot is acquired.
symbols.limitations: Does not handle cases where the rate limiter is full.

symbols.name: usedInWindow
symbols.purpose: Returns the number of slots used in the time window.
symbols.behavior: Returns the number of slots used in the time window.
symbols.limitations: Does not handle cases where the time window is not set.
